fallbackReason: Task subagent bun-eval parsing error; direct review per AGENTS.md guidance
summary: Feature correctly scopes AgentsPage to the active company via useActiveCompany() and prevents CEO agent duplication in onboarding by checking for an existing CEO before insert. Added 7 well-structured tests covering company scoping, duplicate prevention, returning-user skip, and wallet display. Updated loading-error-empty-states tests to match new .eq() chain. All code follows existing patterns and conventions.

observations: Agent query scoping uses the established useActiveCompany() hook pattern consistently
CEO duplicate prevention uses maybeSingle() check-then-update instead of upsert, which is the safer pattern for this use case
Test mocking follows the project's established chain mock pattern
Loading state correctly waits for company resolution before showing agents
